title: Financial Risk Specialists
description: Analyze and measure exposure to credit and market risk threatening the assets, earning capacity, or economic state of an organization. May make recommendations to limit risk.

tasks.text: Analyze areas of potential risk to the assets, earning capacity, or success of organizations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Analyze new legislation to determine impact on risk exposure.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Conduct statistical analyses to quantify risk, using statistical analysis software or econometric models.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with traders to identify and communicate risks associated with specific trading strategies or positions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consult financial literature to ensure use of the latest models or statistical techniques.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Contribute to development of risk management systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine potential environmental impacts of new products or processes on long-term growth and profitability.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop contingency plans to deal with emergencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or implement risk-assessment models or methodologies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Devise scenario analyses reflecting possible severe market events.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Devise systems or processes to monitor validity of risk assessments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Document, and ensure communication of, key risks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Draw charts and graphs, using computer spreadsheets, to illustrate technical reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evaluate and compare the relative quality of various securities in a given industry.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Evaluate the risks and benefits involved in implementing green building technologies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Evaluate the risks related to green investments, such as renewable energy company stocks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Gather risk-related data from internal or external resources.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify key risks and mitigating factors of potential investments, such as asset types and values, legal and ownership structures, professional reputations, customer bases, or industry segments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inform financial decisions by analyzing financial information to forecast business, industry, or economic conditions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interpret data on price, yield, stability, future investment-risk trends, economic influences, and other factors affecting investment programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain input or data quality of risk management systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Meet with clients to answer queries on subjects such as risk exposure, market scenarios, or values-at-risk calculations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor developments in the fields of industrial technology, business, finance, and economic theory.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare plans of action for investment, using financial analyses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Produce reports or presentations that outline findings, explain risk positions, or recommend changes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide statistical modeling advice to other departments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend investments and investment timing to companies, investment firm staff, or the public.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend ways to control or reduce risk.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review or draft risk disclosures for offer documents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Track, measure, or report on aspects of market risk for traded issues.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
